{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process name 'ProcessHerpaderping.exe' is indicative of a process masquerading technique. The command line explicitly includes 'mimikatz.exe', a well-known credential dumping tool. The process writes 'wardog.exe' to the user's desktop and then forks it, suggesting the execution of a potentially malicious payload.",
  "indicators": [
    "ProcessHerpaderping",
    "mimikatz.exe",
    "wardog.exe",
    "write executable to user desktop",
    "fork executable from user desktop"
  ]
